query:
-- Full reconciliation
-- Sales tab totalAmount = subtotal + GST + delivery - discounts
-- subtotal = sum of all lineTotals (including custom items)
-- Itemwise tab = sum of lineTotals for items that INNER JOIN to products (excludes custom items with productId=0)

-- Let's verify: subtotal from orders should equal sum of all lineTotals from order_items
SELECT 
  SUM(o.subtotal) / 100.0 as orders_subtotal_rupees,
  (SELECT SUM(oi.lineTotal) / 100.0 FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o2 ON oi.orderId = o2.id WHERE o2.orderStatus != 'cancelled' AND o2.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' AND o2.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59') as all_items_lineTotal_rupees,
  (SELECT SUM(oi.lineTotal) / 100.0 FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o2 ON oi.orderId = o2.id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id WHERE o2.orderStatus != 'cancelled' AND o2.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' AND o2.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59') as items_with_products_rupees
FROM orders o
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59';

-- Full reconciliation
-- Sales tab totalAmount = subtotal + GST + delivery - discounts
-- subtotal = sum of all lineTotals (including custom items)
-- Itemwise tab = sum of lineTotals for items that INNER JOIN to products (excludes custom items with productId=0)

-- Let's verify: subtotal from orders should equal sum of all lineTotals from order_items
SELECT 
  SUM(o.subtotal) / 100.0 as orders_subtotal_rupees,
  (SELECT SUM(oi.lineTotal) / 100.0 FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o2 ON oi.orderId = o2.id WHERE o2.orderStatus != 'cancelled' AND o2.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' AND o2.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59') as all_items_lineTotal_rupees,
  (SELECT SUM(oi.lineTotal) / 100.0 FROM order_items oi INNER JOIN orders o2 ON oi.orderId = o2.id INNER JOIN products p ON oi.productId = p.id WHERE o2.orderStatus != 'cancelled' AND o2.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' AND o2.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59') as items_with_products_rupees
FROM orders o
WHERE o.orderStatus != 'cancelled' 
  AND o.createdAt >= '2026-01-01' 
  AND o.createdAt <= '2026-02-28 23:59:59';
